metadata.name: Create a Video Package from an Interview

description: A video journalist has a 30-minute interview and needs to edit it down to a 2-minute video package for the web, adding B-roll and graphics.

nodes.task_description: Log the interview footage, identifying the most compelling soundbites.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of timestamps for the best quotes.

nodes.task_description: Assemble a rough cut of the selected soundbites to form a coherent narrative.

expected_outcome.expected: A preliminary video sequence is created.

nodes.task_description: Overlay relevant B-roll footage to cover jump cuts and add visual context.

expected_outcome.expected: The video flows smoothly and is visually engaging.

nodes.task_description: Add lower-third graphics to identify the speaker and a title card at the beginning.

expected_outcome.expected: The video has professional-looking titles and graphics.
